title: [All About That Lace]
description: Ribbon-forged lengths of mixed metals trace across the silk-curtained walls of the room, the thin-wired pieces creating a latticework between the rounded windows interspersed between the shop wares.  A clear-lacquered violetwood rack stands in the middle of a verdant-colored rug, its thin, splayed branches curled slightly upwards to cradle several nest-shaped bowls of clay and terracotta.  Swirls of colorful paint cover the wood-planked floor below, set beneath flora-shaped lanterns.
